name: VideoVault Premiere Extension
releaseNotes:
- keeps the Comments tab hidden unless the desktop bridge reports `comments: true` for the signed-in user
- refreshes proxy availability after NAS-side proxy requests finish, so server and local counts update without reopening the panel
- seeds returned NAS proxy destinations into the local manifest to help the toggle detect freshly created server proxies sooner
- tightens the compact header and tab styling so selected and hover states no longer clash
